home.heroTitle: Your vehicles, all in one place
home.heroBody: Smurbók is a personal vehicle logbook. Track service records, expenses, mileage, reminders, and documents for every vehicle you own — simply and privately.
home.feature1Body: Log every oil change, tire swap, and repair with date, mileage, and cost.
home.feature2Body: Never miss an inspection or insurance renewal with due-date and mileage reminders.
home.feature3Body: Store insurance certificates, registrations, and receipts in one secure place.

demo.banner: Demo mode — changes are not saved.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.section1Body: By creating an account and using Smurbók, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the service.
terms.section2Body: Smurbók is a personal vehicle management tool that lets you track service records, expenses, mileage, reminders, and documents for your vehicles. The service is provided as-is for personal use.
terms.section3Body: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. You must provide accurate information when creating your account.
terms.section4Body: You agree not to misuse the service, attempt to gain unauthorized access to other accounts or systems, or use the service for any unlawful purpose. We reserve the right to suspend accounts that violate these terms.
terms.section5Body: We may update these terms from time to time. Continued use of the service after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the updated terms.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.section1Body: We collect information you provide directly: your email address (via account registration), and vehicle data you enter (service records, expenses, mileage, documents). We do not sell your data to third parties.
privacy.section2Body: Your information is used solely to provide and improve the Smurbók service — to display your vehicle records, send reminder notifications, and maintain your account.
privacy.section3Body: Your data is stored securely and access is protected by authentication. Uploaded documents are stored in encrypted cloud storage. We take reasonable measures to protect your information from unauthorized access.
privacy.section4Body: We use Firebase (Google) for authentication and cloud storage. Your use of Smurbók is also subject to Google's privacy policy when signing in with Google. We do not share your data with other third parties.
privacy.section5Body: You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by contacting us. You can also export or delete individual records within the app.
